evals.expected_output: A concise gallery of available frontend-designer modes with example invocations.
assertions: Agent dispatches to the empty-args handler.
Agent lists Scaffold, Component, Page/View, Theme, Refactor, and Audit modes.
Agent does not guess a mode when no arguments are provided.

evals.expected_output: A scaffold workflow for a modern React frontend using Tailwind v4 and shadcn/ui.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Scaffold mode.
Agent detects or asks for the framework choice.
Agent loads Tailwind, Vite, shadcn, typography, and aesthetic references.
Agent uses Tailwind v4 CSS-first setup with @import "tailwindcss" and @theme.
Agent runs the Visual Acceptance Gate before declaring completion.

evals.expected_output: A component workflow that checks framework context, primitives, accessibility, and rendered proof.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Component mode.
Agent classifies Server vs Client component context.
Agent checks shadcn/ui or Radix primitives before building from scratch.
Agent gathers purpose, interactions, responsive behavior, and accessibility requirements.
Agent runs the Visual Acceptance Gate for the rendered component or demo.

evals.expected_output: A utility component workflow that avoids unnecessary aesthetic-guide loading.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Component mode.
Agent loads React and shadcn references.
Agent does not load aesthetic-guide.md for a utilitarian data table by default.
Agent prioritizes table accessibility, keyboard behavior, and responsive container behavior.

evals.prompt: /frontend-designer build an admin dashboard for support ticket triage
evals.expected_output: A Page/View workflow with restrained operational UI defaults and rendered acceptance checks.
assertions: Agent treats this natural-language prompt as an implicit trigger for Page/View mode.
Agent auto-detects a Page/View request rather than a single Component request.
Agent runs the domain-fit gate before choosing aesthetic direction.
Agent chooses restrained, dense, scannable, predictable UI defaults for admin/support workflows.
Agent plans layout shell, navigation, loading, empty, and error states.
Agent runs the Visual Acceptance Gate before completion.

evals.prompt: /frontend-designer build a hero section landing page with animated gradient background
evals.expected_output: A Page/View or visual component workflow using aesthetic guidance, design tokens, progressive enhancement, and contrast checks.
assertions: Agent treats the request as a visual page or hero surface.
Agent loads aesthetic-guide.md because this is marketing or landing-page work.
Agent uses Tailwind v4 design tokens rather than tailwind.config.js.
Agent guards partial or experimental CSS features with @supports and fallbacks.
Agent verifies WCAG AA text and UI contrast.

evals.expected_output: A Theme workflow that extracts hardcoded values and organizes them into Tailwind v4 theme variables.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Theme mode.
Agent scans for hardcoded color and style values.
Agent organizes values into primitive, semantic, and component token layers.
Agent generates an @theme block for utility-generating design tokens.
Agent treats contrast-color() as experimental and provides manual fallbacks.

evals.expected_output: A Refactor workflow with pre-scan, approval gate, file-by-file migration, and rendered verification.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Refactor mode.
Agent runs the pre-scan checklist before edits.
Agent presents a file-by-file migration plan and waits for approval before changing code.
Agent verifies project checks and the Visual Acceptance Gate after changes.
Agent re-runs the pre-scan checklist to confirm improvement.

evals.expected_output: A read-only frontend audit report with severity-grouped findings and visual proof status.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Audit mode.
Agent never modifies code.
Agent scores stack currency, component patterns, design tokens, CSS modernness, typography, accessibility, and visual proof.
Agent reports findings grouped by Critical, Warning, Suggestion, Strengths, and Recommended Actions.
Agent states whether live visual proof was possible.

evals.prompt: /frontend-designer build a REST API for user authentication
evals.expected_output: A refusal or redirect because backend API work is outside frontend-designer scope.
assertions: Agent detects the request is backend/API work.
Agent refuses or redirects to an appropriate backend/API skill.
Agent does not attempt to build the API.

evals.prompt: /frontend-designer fix our broken Vitest tests and Zustand state bug in React Router
evals.expected_output: A refusal or redirect because testing, state management, and routing are outside frontend-designer scope.
assertions: This is a negative-control eval for frontend-designer routing.
Agent detects testing, state management, and routing signals.
Agent does not route the request to generic Audit mode.
Agent redirects to more appropriate skills or project-specific tooling.

evals.prompt: /frontend-designer the modal layout overlaps on mobile and keyboard focus is broken
evals.expected_output: An Audit workflow because the bug is visual and interaction-focused UI behavior.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Audit mode.
Agent treats overlap, mobile layout, and keyboard focus as frontend UI concerns.
Agent stays read-only unless the user later requests a refactor.
Agent recommends visual acceptance checks for any subsequent fix.
